member.name: T:YAEP.Data.ORM.Attributes.DbTableAttribute
member.summary: Defines the name of a table

member.name: M:YAEP.Data.ORM.Attributes.DbTableAttribute.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a table mapping to a specific name
member.param: The name of this table in the database.

member.name: P:YAEP.Data.ORM.Attributes.DbTableAttribute.TableName
member.summary: The name of this table in the database.
